details.species_lookup_table: 70+ species with scientific names, families, density ranges

details.cites_protected_species: 25+ timber genera with Appendix status, effective dates, annotations
details.iucn_status_reference: 20+ key commercial species with IUCN categories and population trends
details.legality_frameworks: EUTR/EUDR, US Lacey Act, VNFOREST VNTLAS, Japan Clean Wood Act, Australia ILPA
details.physical_benchmarks: MC states, EMC table, density classification, EN 338 grades, T/R ratios
details.substitution_patterns: 10 known substitution pairs with detection difficulty and discriminators

details.language_detection: Vietnamese (vi) + English (en) with full translation table
details.auto_fix_logic: 2-attempt auto-fix per gate with explicit remapping tables
details.error_recovery: 8 error types with detection + recovery strategies + max retries
details.output_template: 12-section report template with mandatory disclosure before verdict

details.kb_sections: 7 sections covering IAWA, MC/drying, density/mechanics, CITES, standards, papers, methods
details.paper_citations: 14 DOIs with Tier labels in SKB
details.crawl_pipeline: ArXiv + Semantic Scholar + RSS feeds with SHA256 dedup + scoring + structured logging + dataclass model
details.test_coverage: 20 unit tests for knowledge_updater.py (pytest-compatible + standalone runner)

details.test_scenarios: 7 concrete scenarios with real wood species data

details.cross_references: CLAUDE.md references all sub-skills, knowledge base, and tools

phase6.description: Grounding Layer, Executable Tools Registry & Chain-of-Thought Router

details.reference_grounding: 28 curated species profiles + 16 CITES listings + 28 IUCN assessments with cross-key integrity
details.grounding_api: reference_data.py: fuzzy (Levenshtein<=2) species resolution, genus-aware CITES/IUCN lookup, density comparison, moisture classification, substitution-risk scoring
details.executable_tools: tools_registry.py: 8 JSON-Schema-bound offline-safe handlers (lookup_species/cites/iucn, compare_density, classify_moisture, assess_substitution, validate_schema, quality_gate)
details.router: sub-router.md chain-of-thought router invoked as Step 1.5; run/skip plan + degradation forecast + limitation notes
details.example_output: assets/examples/sample_output.md golden report (Scenario 1, Teak, vi) demonstrating 11/11 gates passing
details.setup_validation: scripts/setup.py health report now 61 checks (incl. reference data + tools bootstrap)

features: Genus-aware CITES/IUCN lookup with severity tie-break
